project_type: Next.js 16 App Router static site with Tailwind CSS 4
build_system: Next.js with bun as package manager (npm not available in sandbox). Tailwind CSS 4 via @tailwindcss/postcss plugin.
test_framework: No test framework configured. Lint via ESLint (eslint-config-next).
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'bun run build' - should compile and generate static pages without errors. 2. Run 'bun run lint' - should pass without errors.
setup_instructions: 1. cd /projects/sandbox/kiro-web-week4 && bun install (already done). 2. Dependencies are installed.
environment_constraints: Open internet mode. Node/npm not available - use 'bun' for all commands. node_modules/next/dist/docs/ contains Next.js 16 documentation - AGENTS.md warns to read these docs before writing code as this version may have breaking changes.
contribution_requirements: Use responsive Tailwind CSS utility classes. Ensure Semantic HTML is used for all layout sections (from steering file). AGENTS.md: read docs in node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing code.
key_patterns: - App Router: app/page.tsx is the homepage, app/layout.tsx is root layout. - Tailwind CSS 4: uses @import 'tailwindcss' and @theme inline block in globals.css. - Fonts: Geist and Geist_Mono from next/font/google, applied via CSS variables. - Server Components by default; use 'use client' directive for interactive components. - Static site output (no dynamic routes needed for landing page).
directory_structure: Root: Next.js project. app/ contains page.tsx (homepage), layout.tsx (root layout), globals.css. public/ contains SVG assets. node_modules/next/dist/docs/ contains Next.js 16 documentation.
